title: Class 321
description: A british Rail Class 321 For MTR Mod
body:
AN UPDATED VERSION CAN NOW BE FOUND MADE BY Navi / Merric (LX9702) !
the updated version is the same model but heavily overhauled by navi including a much better interior and phototextures!

The British Rail Class 321!

liverys:

greater anglia red doors

greater anglia blue doors

greater anglia renatus (interior remodel is due)

london overground

thameslink fictional

first capital connect

network southeast

sounds by Navi / Merric (LX9702)

model and textures by me (georgecat19)
